Keep up the good work EMVR and have a good one!

reviews.review_title: Got falsely banned for no reason
reviews.review_description: My first time playing the game I only got one pack and that was the horror pack, I had a expectations for this game and if it wasn’t for my false ban I would’ve rated this game five stars but when I was playing the only option I couldn’t get up and somebody falsely accuse me of saying the N-word so I had to deal with it, and I had to say that I never even said the N-word but the next day I got on the game and and I was banned for apparently moding and I got ￼￼ permanently, banned for no reason I don’t know what happened, but I probably imagine that some￼ Guy spam reported me for modeling and I didn’t do anything. Please unban me from your game. ￼ I even spoke two developer asking him to unban me, but never got unbanned ￼ and I got no message from the developer saying that I would be unbanned please unban me. ￼ I didn’t do anything wrong.

developer_response.body: Reach out to the EMVRGames Team via the MasterRunners Server @ discord.gg/mrvr to ban appeal.

reviews.review_title: Honest rating as part of EMVR designing.
reviews.review_description: The game can tend to be sort of laggy on quest two at times, but the games honestly really fun. I've been playing the game for almost 2 years and dont think i will stop. So glad to be able to be a big part of the community and hope to be even more known. Thank you. MasterRunners!

I lost all of my cosmetics awhile ago and no moderator has helped me at all. The corruption ￼event makes my eyes bleed, it’s made for rage bait and not a single checkpoint. If you die you have to walk all the way back to the portal, then you have to watch a 40 second clip, get the orb in the shop, go back to the portal, do easy parkour, then medium, die in hard and rinse and repeat.￼

developer_response.body:
Hello,

A warning is kept at the loading screen "Warning:
This Event includes bright lights and textures which may not be suitable for those with photosensitive conditions. This game also includes horror themes. Player discretion is advised", letting everyone know this event is bright.

The event is meant to be difficult and challenging, we want to create a challenge and not a boring fight for players.

The cosmetics being lost can be easily retrieved by going near the LIV Camera in-game and hitting the migration button while offline.

Thanks,
EthanMonke
